title: What's Ahead for Opendoor Q2 2022 Earnings Preview
text: What's Ahead for Opendoor Technologies' (OPEN) in Q2 Earnings. OPEN was scheduled to release second-quarter 2022 results on August 4. The Zacks Consensus Estimate for revenues was pegged at $4.14 billion, indicating growth of more than 100% from the year-ago quarter. The consensus estimate lay within the company's guided range of $4.10-$4.30 billion. The top line was likely to have benefited from the company's continued market expansion efforts and increase in home purchases. The Zacks Consensus Estimate for earnings was pegged at 14 cents per share, indicating year-over-year surge of more than 100%. Healthy margins due to structural price and cost improvements were likely to have driven the company's bottom line performance.
